name: preload-apt
description: Download and upload apt .deb packages to packagerepo

options.name: arch
options.help: amd64, arm64, riscv64, ppc64le, or all

options.name: ver
options.help: Version tag for the apt package set

steps.command:
if [ "{opt.arch}" = "all" ]; then printf 'amd64
arm64
riscv64
ppc64le'; else echo "{opt.arch}"; fi

if [ "{group}" = "backend-build-deps" ]; then echo 'gcc-13 g++-13 make cmake python3 python3-pip python3-venv pkg-config libpq-dev libssl-dev zlib1g-dev perl perl-modules ca-certificates'; elif [ "{group}" = "backend-runtime-deps" ]; then echo 'libpq5 libssl3 ca-certificates'; elif [ "{group}" = "frontend-runtime-deps" ]; then echo 'nodejs ca-certificates curl'; fi

CID=$(docker create --platform linux/{arch} debian:sid sh -c "apt-get update -qq && apt-get install --download-only -y {pkgs} >/dev/null 2>&1 && tar czf /out.tar.gz /var/cache/apt/archives/*.deb"); docker start -a $CID; docker cp $CID:/out.tar.gz /tmp/{group}-{arch}.tar.gz; docker rm $CID >/dev/null
